rules.rule: All contributions must originate from a fork of the target repository; feature branches must not be pushed directly to upstream.
Branch names must follow: users/{github-handle}/{type}/{short-description} using lowercase-kebab-case.
Commit messages must start with an ALL-CAPS category prefix, a colon, and an imperative sentence ending with a period.
Commits must be atomic — one logical change per commit.
A PR must not be submitted for review unless the build passes and all tests are green.
Each PR must address exactly one concern; mixing features, fixes, and configuration changes in one PR is forbidden.
Secrets, connection strings, and API keys must never be committed to source control.
CI/CD pipelines must be defined in YAML and committed to source control.
